ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each golf course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the golf course */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the course */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par of the golf course */,
  "yardage" INTEGER /* Total yardage of the golf course */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the golf course */,
  "slope" INTEGER /* Slope of the golf course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "handicap" INTEGER /* Handicap of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the golf course where the game was played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who played the game */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved in the game */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of play (e.g., Normal, Tournament) */,
  "month_year" TEXT /* Month and year the game was played */,
  "rating_slope" TEXT /* Rating and slope of the course */,
  "differential" REAL /* Differential score */,
  "used" TEXT /* Whether the score was used (e.g., *) or not (e.g., None) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES game_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the game */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_versions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the golf course being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the golf course */,
  "slope" INTEGER /* Slope of the golf course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_ratings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
